title: MD
biography: Robin Warren is an Australian pathologist who first observed Helicobacter pylori in gastric biopsies and proposed its link to ulcers. Nobel Prize 2005.
aiSummary: Robin Warren is a pathology specialist at Royal Perth Hospital. Based in Perth.
